tasks.title: Bootstrap control-plane artifacts
tasks.description: Verify operating summary, implementation contract, capability matrix, queues, evals, traces, and dashboard exist.
tasks.context: Most Capable Agent System Prompt first milestone.
tasks.verification_plan: Harness eval passes and foundational artifacts exist.

tasks.title: REPAIR: HubSpot Sync Failure for lead SKY-MOCK-1782916325471 (reason: no_token)
REVIEW: Estimate approval required for lead SKY-MOCK-1782916325471 (Jane Homeowner — Residential)

evals.description: Foundational artifacts exist and the harness can report status without a pending goal.

milestones.title: Closed-loop harness baseline
milestones.definition: Accept a goal, decompose tasks, route work, execute, verify, record memory, show activity, and learn one thing.

milestones.title: Durable reliability controls
milestones.definition: Add idempotent effects, durable waits, checkpoints, dead-letter handling, and trace inspection.

milestones.title: Skill and workflow packaging
milestones.definition: Promote repeated successful trajectories into skills, playbooks, and specialized state-machine workflows.

milestones.title: Broader computer-work adapters
milestones.definition: Add browser, desktop, research, business-system, and science adapters with domain-specific verification.

capabilities.surface: email, chat, calendar, CRM, support, finance

policies.rule: Safety orange elements (#FF5A00) must use dark charcoal (#050505) text.
No emojis in source code or React components.
All border-radius properties must be set to 0px or rounded-none globally.
External side effects require an idempotency key, recorded effect state, and approval when sensitive.
The harness may quarantine and recommend recovery, but it must not automatically revert user files.

proactive_findings.description: Strict Brutalist constraint violation: Found 'rounded-lg' class. All elements must maintain exactly 0px border-radius.
